summary: Production outage due to ingestion worker memory leak leading to API saturation and cascading timeouts.
contributing_factors: infrastructure: no autoscaling or circuit breakers
root_cause: Long-lived object retention in ingestion batch job; backpressure paths blocked main API thread pool under load.

summary: Deployment rollback caused by config drift between EC2 instances; inconsistent environment variables.
root_cause: Manual deployment to non-uniform instances; no blue/green or pre-deploy validation.

summary: Emergency security patch for deprecated lodash with known vulnerability; engineering hours only cost.
root_cause: Lack of dependency hygiene and automated vulnerability management.

summary: Data inconsistency in invoice totals across reporting and billing views.
contributing_factors: architecture: shared DB and cross-module triggers
root_cause: Coupled modules wrote divergent discount calculations without integration-level validation.

summary: Checkout performance regression from N+1 queries in reporting endpoint; elevated latency impacted conversions.
contributing_factors: architecture: tight coupling forcing synchronous joins
root_cause: Unbounded ORM eager loading with per-row queries during peak; missing query optimization and indices.
